verses.text: Seven angels with 'the seven last plagues' appear; the victors over the beast stand on 'a sea of glass,' with harps. Last plagues. God's wrath reaches its fullness.
Seven angels with 'the seven last plagues' appear; the victors over the beast stand on 'a sea of glass,' with harps. Last plagues. God's wrath reaches its fullness.
They sing 'the song of Moses... and the Lamb': 'Great and marvellous are thy works... just and true are thy ways.' Conquerors' song. The redeemed praise God's righteous judgments.
They sing 'the song of Moses... and the Lamb': 'Great and marvellous are thy works... just and true are thy ways.' Conquerors' song. The redeemed praise God's righteous judgments.
The temple opened, and the seven angels came out 'clothed in pure and white linen,' girt with gold. Sent forth. The holy ministers of wrath proceed from God.
The temple opened, and the seven angels came out 'clothed in pure and white linen,' girt with gold. Sent forth. The holy ministers of wrath proceed from God.
One creature gave them 'seven golden vials full of the wrath of God,' and the temple filled with smoke, none able to enter. Filled with glory. None may enter till the plagues are done.
